psychology.cognitive_domain: Pre-conscious, latent, possibility

day_0.science: Vacuum state, quantum foam, zero-point energy, empty set
day_0.art: Malevich's Black Square, John Cage's 4'33", minimalism
day_0.philosophy: Taoist Wu, Buddhist Sunyata, Heidegger's Nothing

psychology.cognitive_domain: Birth trauma, first boundary

day_1.science: Quantum tunneling, wave function collapse, phase transition, first bifurcation
day_1.art: Rothko's color fields, Lucio Fontana's slashed canvas, emergence
day_1.philosophy: Aristotle's archê, Leibniz's 'why is there something rather than nothing?', the Cut (Lacan)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Shock, trauma response, epiphany

day_2.science: Exothermic reaction, lightning discharge, neural spike, Big Bang nucleosynthesis, symmetry breaking
day_2.art: Futurism (Boccioni), action painting (Pollock), performance art (Abramović), the happening
day_2.philosophy: Heraclitus' flux, Nietzsche's Dionysian, revolutionary moment (Marx), the Event (Badiou), kairos

psychology.cognitive_domain: Defense mechanisms, approach-avoidance conflict, threshold anxiety

day_3.science: Diffusion gradient, osmotic pressure, information flow, selective membrane
day_3.art: Duchamp's door, installation art thresholds, liminal spaces
day_3.philosophy: Kierkegaard's angst at the threshold, Sartre's freedom as burden, liminality (Turner)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Passion, eros, emotional intensity, the hearth as psychic center

day_4.science: Fire element, combustion, oxidation, energy release, plasma state
day_4.art: Color field painting (warm palettes), Fauvism, fire in Turner, Yves Klein's fire paintings
day_4.philosophy: Heraclitus' fire as arche, eros as cosmic force (Plato), Hegelian passion in history, desire (Spinoza)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Attachment, object relations, relational binding

day_5.science: Covalent bond, orbital overlap, molecular binding, structural coupling
day_5.art: String art, Calder's wire sculptures, the line as connector
day_5.philosophy: Buber I-Thou relation, Aristophanes' split souls (Plato), relational ontology, Levinas' face-to-face

psychology.cognitive_domain: The unconscious depths, fluid intelligence, adaptive flow

day_6.science: Fluid dynamics, turbulence, deep ocean currents, hydrogen bonding, the solvent of life
day_6.art: Water Lilies (Monet), Hokusai's Great Wave, immersive installations (teamLab)
day_6.philosophy: Tao Te Ching on water, Heraclitus' river, Thales' water as arche, fluidity of self (Deleuze)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Ego boundary, defensive perimeter, territoriality

day_7.science: Boundary layer, cell membrane, semi-permeable boundary, domain walls
day_7.art: Christo's wrapped fences, land art boundaries, Richard Serra's torqued walls
day_7.philosophy: Freud's repression barrier, Kant's limits of reason, the bounded self (Locke), walls and exclusion (Foucault)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Joy/play, social pleasure, aesthetic enjoyment, the lake as mirror of self

day_8.science: Surface tension, reflection physics, standing waves, echo/feedback systems
day_8.art: Narcissus myth in art, Velázquez's Las Meninas, water reflections in Impressionism, Yayoi Kusama's infinity rooms
day_8.philosophy: Epicurean pleasure, Nietzsche's amor fati, play as fundamental (Huizinga), Lacan's mirror stage

psychology.cognitive_domain: Agency, sense of agency, executive function, grasping (upadana)

day_9.science: Force vector, directional impulse, action at a distance, applied force
day_9.art: Micangelo's Creation (the hand), Rodin's hands, Da Vinci hand studies, magicians' hands
day_9.philosophy: Free will as directed force, Aristotle's efficient cause, Marx's laboring hand, Arendt's fabrication

psychology.cognitive_domain: Intellect as airy, mental space, the breath in meditation, intellectualization defense

day_10.science: Air element, gas laws, atmospheric pressure, aerodynamics, Bernoulli principle
day_10.art: Wind in art (Turner's storms), sky in Constable, inflatable art, kinetic wind sculptures
day_10.philosophy: Anaximenes' air as arche, pneuma in Stoicism, Hegel's Geist, breath as life (Genesis)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Superego, conscience, guilt as correction, the inner critic

day_11.science: Feedback loop, correction mechanism, steering dynamics, negative feedback
day_11.art: Instructional art (Fluxus), didactic art, art as teacher (Beuys), corrective interventions
day_11.philosophy: Socratic midwifery, Plato's philosopher-king, Rousseau's Emile, Dewey's progressive education

psychology.cognitive_domain: Mother archetype, oceanic feeling, pre-Oedipal state, nurturance

day_12.science: Water as life medium, amniotic fluid, primordial soup, hydrophilic/hydrophobic interaction
day_12.art: Birth of Venus (Botticelli), maternal madonnas, sea in Friedrich, underwater photography
day_12.philosophy: Thales' water as origin, maternal metaphysics (Irigaray), birthing as philosophical event

psychology.cognitive_domain: Individuation midpoint

day_13.science: Phase transition critical point, superposition, quantum entanglement
day_13.art: Mona Lisa's smile, Rothko chapel, mandalas
day_13.philosophy: Aristotle's golden mean, Hegel's dialectical synthesis

psychology.cognitive_domain: Support system, dependency vs interdependency, holding environment (Winnicott)

day_14.science: Support structure, truss, arch, load distribution, scaffolding, bridge engineering
day_14.art: Scaffolding as art (Christo), support structures in sculpture, the crutch in Giacometti
day_14.philosophy: Relational support (ethics of care), Rawls' social support structures, Heidegger's Geworfenheit, scaffolding (Vygotsky)

psychology.cognitive_domain: The gaze, visual perception, witness consciousness, surveillance anxiety

day_15.science: Photoreception, visual processing, observer effect in quantum mechanics, sight as data gathering
day_15.art: The eye in surrealism (Magritte), perspective as discovery (Renaissance), surveillance art
day_15.philosophy: Sartre's look (the gaze of the Other), Foucault's panopticon, Merleau-Ponty's eye and mind

psychology.cognitive_domain: Speech function, verbalization of the unconscious, speech anxiety, the voice

day_16.science: Speech acoustics, phonon physics, information theory (Shannon), communication channels
day_16.art: Spoken word art, sound poetry (Dada), the scream (Munch), text art, voice as instrument
day_16.philosophy: Locke's word as sign, Wittgenstein's language games, Austin's speech acts, Derrida's differance

psychology.cognitive_domain: Moral rooting, conscience formation, the 'rooted' personality (Fromm)

day_17.science: Root system, tree as network, branching algorithms, decision trees
day_17.art: Tree of life (Klimt), Yggdrasil in Norse art, tree in Caspar David Friedrich, bonsai as art
day_17.philosophy: Heidegger's rootedness in earth (Bodenständigkeit), arboreal thought (Deleuze), justice as rooted (Rawls)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Contemplation, meditation state, the witness, apatheia (Stoic stillness)

day_18.science: Inertia, potential energy, geological time, mountain as accumulator, tectonic stress
day_18.art: Rothko's late dark paintings, zen ink painting (suibokuga), Friedrich's monk on mountain, Tarkovsky stillness
day_18.philosophy: Stoic apatheia, Epicurean ataraxia, Heidegger's Gelassenheit (releasement), Zhuangzi's fasting of the mind

psychology.cognitive_domain: Executive function, metacognition, the observing ego, consciousness

day_19.science: Neuroprocessing, the skull as protective vault, cephalization in evolution, cognitive command
day_19.art: Head sculptures (Giacometti), portrait as power, the disembodied head in surrealism, crowned figures
day_19.philosophy: Cartesian cogito, mind-body problem, consciousness studies (Chalmers), extended mind (Clark)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Insight ('aha!' moment), illumination, brightness of consciousness, passion

day_20.science: Electromagnetic radiation, light as wave/particle, combustion chemistry, stellar fusion
day_20.art: Caravaggio's chiaroscuro, Turner on fire, neon art (Flavin), the flame as subject
day_20.philosophy: Plato's sun allegory, Enlightenment metaphor, Nietzsche's 'lightning of the concept', Heidegger's Lichtung

psychology.cognitive_domain: The mark as identity, signature psychology, branding as self-extension, stigma

day_21.science: DNA marking, epigenetic markers, inscription physics, the mark as trace
day_21.art: Signature in art, branded art (Koons, Warhol), tattoo as art, the mark of the maker
day_21.philosophy: The trace (Derrida), marking as original violence, sign as mark (Peirce), branded self (Fromm)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Final form psychology, acceptance of limitation, completion satisfaction

day_22.science: Solid-state physics, crystallography, final form as lowest energy state
day_22.art: Late style (Adorno/Said), the bent form in sculpture (Moore), final works of artists, wabi-sabi
day_22.philosophy: Entelechy (Aristotle), completion vs perfection, the crooked timber (Kant), finitude (Heidegger)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Oceanic feeling, terminal tranquility, the 'deep' unconscious, final peace

day_23.science: Terminal deposition, entropy maximum, heat death (as water metaphor), the deep as terminus
day_23.art: The sea as death (Friedrich), underwater art (Hockney), the abyss in Romanticism, drowning imagery
day_23.philosophy: Schopenhauer's will as blind sea, existential depth, the abyss (Nietzsche), water as death metaphor (Bachelard)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Gentle influence, suggestibility, permeation of ideas, subtle persuasion

day_24.science: Fluid dynamics (laminar flow), diffusion, osmosis, gas exchange, the gentle force
day_24.art: Whistler's atmospheric effects, wind in Japanese painting (Ma Yuan), gentle brushwork (xieyi), scent art
day_24.philosophy: Wu wei (effortless action), soft power (Nye), gentle persuasion (Gorgias), the subtle (Laozi), care ethics

psychology.cognitive_domain: Closure (psychological), sealed memory, container as security

day_25.science: Containment boundary, sealed system, closure in thermodynamics, irreversible process
day_25.art: The sealed letter in art, locked doors as motif, the container as sculpture (Judd), sealed spaces (Turrell)
day_25.philosophy: Death as final seal (Heidegger), closure as narrative need, sealed book of life, irreversibility (Prigogine)

psychology.cognitive_domain: Self-actualization complete, sovereign psyche, the 'I' as pure consciousness

day_26.science: The laws of physics, fundamental forces, universal constants, mathematical structure of reality, pure information
day_26.art: The sublime (Burke/Kant), abstract expressionism, Rothko's chapel (transcendence), infinity in art (Escher)
day_26.philosophy: Hegel's absolute spirit, Spinoza's Deus sive Natura, the One (Plotinus), Advaita Vedanta, telos as completion

psychology.cognitive_domain: The Dreamer = The Dream

aboriginal.concept: The Dreaming — Dreamer and Dream are one

day_27.science: Cosmic cycle, eternal return, Big Crunch/Big Bang oscillation, conservation of information
day_27.art: Ouroboros, mandala as completion, the circle in art (Kandinsky), eternal return symbolism
day_27.philosophy: Nietzsche's eternal recurrence, Spinoza's intellectual love of God, Advaita Vedanta's non-duality
